addImpactedEnemy(Enemy) - Method in class io.github.fiitgame.Projectiles.MeleeProjectile
Function to add impacted enemy so it doesnt damage one enemy multiple times during its lifetime.
Archer - Class in io.github.fiitgame.Player
Archer class that has medium health and damage, but can attack from a distance.

Main constructor.
ARCHER - Enum constant in enum class io.github.fiitgame.Player.PlayerClass
 
ArcherProjectile - Class in io.github.fiitgame.Projectiles
Arrow that is faster than the mage projectile but has a limited range.
ArcherProjectile(Texture, Vector2, Vector2, int) - Constructor for class io.github.fiitgame.Projectiles.ArcherProjectile
Main constructor
assets - Static variable in class io.github.fiitgame.Main
 
attack() - Method in class io.github.fiitgame.Player.Archer
Attack function that creates mage projectile in dirrection of the mouse cursor

Attack function for mage.

Attack method.

Attack exception to process child exceptions
